onboarding.welcome:
👋 Welcome to 183Tracker – Your Tax Residency Tracker

Track your travel and stay on top of tax residency rules — automatically.

🌍 WHAT THIS BOT DOES
Log your stays in each country and get clear, automatic calculations of your residency exposure — no spreadsheets required.

📅 CALENDAR-YEAR TRACKING
Know exactly how many days you've spent in any country within a calendar year — the basis for most 183-day tax residency rules.

🔄 ROLLING 365-DAY TRACKING
See your exposure on a rolling 12-month window, not just the calendar year — useful for countries that use a rolling test.

🇪🇺 SCHENGEN 90/180 TRACKING
Track your Schengen Area days against the 90-days-in-any-180-days rule, so you never overstay by accident.

📤 IMPORT & EXPORT
Bring in your travel history via CSV or XLSX, and export your data any time.

🔒 PRIVACY-FIRST & FREE
No signup required. Your data stays yours. Completely free, forever. Open source on GitHub.

⚠️ This bot estimates physical presence only and does not provide legal or tax advice. Always consult a qualified legal or tax professional regarding your taxes. We are not responsible for the correctness or accuracy of any calculation. By continuing, you agree to our Terms of Service (https://183tracker.com/tos) and Privacy Policy (https://183tracker.com/pp).


Let's get started — choose your preferred date format:
onboarding.complete:
✅ You're all set!

You can:
• Start tracking new trips
• Import existing travel history from CSV or XLSX

If you've already been traveling, import your historical stays first:

/import

Use /help to see all available commands.

start.welcome_back:
Welcome back, {name}!

You're all set. Log a stay with `/in Country date` or open `/report` for a summary.

in.country_not_recognized:
❌ Country not recognized.

Please enter a valid country name.

Example:
`/in Thailand today`
in.invalid_usage:
Usage: `/in Country date`

Example: `/in Thailand today`
in.prompt_country: Which country do you want to add entry to?
in.prompt_date:
What is the entry date?

Examples:
- today
- yesterday
- 24.05.26
in.prompt_date_for_country:
What is the entry date for {country}?

Examples:
- today
- yesterday
- 24.05.26

out.invalid_usage:
Usage: `/out Country date`

Example: `/out Thailand today`
out.prompt_country: Which country do you want to add exit for?
out.prompt_date:
What is the exit date?

Examples:
- today
- yesterday
- 24.05.26
out.prompt_date_for_country:
What is the exit date for {country}?

Examples:
- today
- yesterday
- 24.05.26
out.no_open_stay: No open stay found for {country}. Use `/in` first.
out.exit_before_entry: ❌ Exit date cannot be before entry date.

transition.cancelled: Transition cancelled. Your previous stay is unchanged.
transition.expired: This action is no longer valid. Please send /in again.
transition.already_closed: That stay is already closed. Please send /in again.
transition.invalid_dates: Invalid dates for this transition. Please send /in again.

historical_exit.prompt:
{flag} {country} was added starting on {entry_date}.

Your next known country entry is:
{next_flag} {next_country} on {next_entry_date}.

Was this also your {country} exit date?
historical_exit.another_date:
Okay. {country} is still open.

Send `/out {country} date` when you want to add the exit date.
historical_exit.expired: This action is no longer valid. Please send /in again.

where.no_active:
❌ No active stay found.

You can add one with:
/in Country today

history.empty: 🧳 No stays found for this filter.
history.custom_dates_error:
❌ Could not parse date range.

Examples:
01.03.26 05.07.26
01-03-2026 05-07-2026

settings.export_message: Here's your complete travel history in CSV format.
settings.delete_warning:
⚠️ This action is irreversible.

We strongly recommend exporting your data first.

To permanently delete all your data, send:

DELETE ALL DATA
settings.deleted: Your data has been permanently deleted.

stay.removed:
🗑 Stay removed.

You can now add corrected dates.
stay.remove_not_found: Stay not found or already removed.

manage.action_prompt: What would you like to do?
manage.ask_exit: Enter new exit date (or "Present" to clear):
manage.stay_not_found: Stay not found or already removed.
